sprints.title: AgentForge v4.5 Collaborative Intelligence Sprint

items.title: Task Pipeline Engine
items.description: Multi-agent DAG-based pipeline executor with topological ordering and parallel stage execution

items.title: Agent-to-Agent Delegation Protocol
items.description: Runtime delegation protocol validating authority against team.yaml graph with full logging

items.title: Cross-Session Memory Persistence
items.description: SessionMemoryManager persists learnings, decisions, patterns across Claude Code restarts

items.title: Workflow Templates
items.description: Predefined multi-agent workflow templates (code-review, bug-investigation, feature-design, knowledge-sync)

items.title: BusFileAdapter Real-Time Streaming
items.description: Enhanced BusFileAdapter with auto-flush, recovery, loadSince, and event count tracking

items.title: Agent Health Heartbeat System
items.description: AgentHeartbeat with staleness detection, team health reports, V4HealthCheck integration

items.title: Smart Task Decomposition
items.description: Enhanced SmartRouter with complexity analysis and agent capability matching

items.title: MetaLearningEngine Pattern Persistence
items.description: Persist patterns, knowledge graph, and insights to disk across sessions

items.title: /agentforge:workflow Command
items.description: New slash command to invoke predefined multi-agent workflows

items.title: Delegation Authority Visualization Data
items.description: Export delegation graph as structured JSON for dashboard consumption

items.title: Error Recovery and Retry Logic
items.description: RetryPolicy with configurable backoff, circuit breaker, error classification

items.title: /agentforge:health Command
items.description: CLI command for quick system health check

items.title: Pipeline Visualization Data
items.description: Pipeline state as structured JSON for dashboard DAG visualization

items.title: Session History Browser Data
items.description: Session summaries written to JSON for dashboard browsing

items.title: Comprehensive Pipeline + Delegation Tests
items.description: Integration tests for pipeline execution, delegation edge cases, memory round-trips

successCriteria: Pipeline with 3+ stages executes in topological order passing context between stages
Delegation protocol validates authority against team.yaml and rejects unauthorized delegations
Session memory persists across create/end cycles — survives restart
Workflow templates instantiate and produce valid pipeline definitions
Bus events persisted to .agentforge/data/bus-events.json in real time
Agent heartbeats write status files and detect staleness
100+ new tests added for v4.5 subsystems
auditFindings: Agents execute in isolation — no multi-agent coordination
No task pipeline or DAG-based execution
Delegation graph exists in team.yaml but no runtime protocol enforces it
KnowledgeStore loses all session data on Claude Code restart
No predefined workflow templates for common multi-agent patterns
BusFileAdapter exists but not wired to auto-flush during invocations
V4HealthCheck has no registered probes — agent status files never written
SmartRouter splits tasks on 'and'/comma — no real decomposition
No error recovery or retry logic for failed agent invocations

learnings: DAG-based pipeline execution with topological layers enables clean parallel stage execution
Delegation protocol with graph validation prevents unauthorized agent interactions
Cross-session memory with rolling window and compaction balances history depth with storage
Workflow templates with parameter substitution make multi-agent patterns reusable
BusFileAdapter auto-flush provides real-time event persistence without blocking
Heartbeat staleness detection requires careful threshold tuning (1ms too short for tests)
Zero new dependencies maintained across 6 new modules and 3 new type definition files
